body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Computer Science. Grade level: Class XI / Class XII. Session: Computer Systems and Organisation - Session 2. Concept: The CPU Architecture: Inside the Brain. Visual requirement: A diagram showing a central box labeled 'CPU' with three smaller boxes inside: ALU, CU, and Registers. Arrows should show data flowing from the CU to the ALU and back through the registers. An illustration of a factory floor where the Manager (CU) points at workers (ALU) who are holding materials in their hands (Registers). Style: textbook-friendly, scientific, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, centered composition, white or light background, student-safe. Important: do not draw any words, letters, labels, captions, heading text, numbering, or watermark inside the image. Show the concept visually only. Keep all explanation outside the image. Prefer clean shapes, arrows without text, color-coded parts, and simple educational composition.

options.negative_prompt: no words, no text, no letters, no typography, no labels, no captions, no title text, no handwritten text, no gibberish text, no watermark
